name: Nuclear Fission Power Plant
tagline: Controlled chain reaction steam supply that decouples electricity from chemical fuel oxidation for years per refuelling
problem:
Burning coal or gas ties megawatt-years to chemistry in the air — carbon leaves the stack whether you like the climate mathematics or not. Fission concentrates energy in heavy nuclei: a modest mass of fuel, handled with discipline, can run a turbine hall for years between refuel outages. The engineering problem is kinetic, not rhetorical: keep exactly one neutron from each fission, on average, causing another fission; remove heat faster than fuel and cladding can melt; confine radioactive products when pipes break or operators fumble.

Materials age in ways invisible to casual inspection: neutron embrittlement hardens reactor vessels; helium bubbles gather in welds; boron absorbers deplete on schedules easy to miss in a busy outage. Chemistry is equally unforgiving: radiolysis makes aggressive species; crud on fuel surfaces shifts power peaks; iodine spikes after transients demand instruments humans trust under stress.

Decay heat is the moral fact reactor students learn first: after you SCRAM the chain reaction, fission products still release roughly single-digit percent of full power immediately, falling on hour and day scales but not to zero for years. Cooling must survive blackouts, sabotage scenarios, and human forgetfulness — because it will be tested by at least one of them.

Socially, the plant is inseparable from safeguards, waste stewardship, and transparent regulation. Physics can be perfect on paper while institutions rot; the opposite is also true — careful people can run modest machines safely for decades if design margins and training culture align.
overview:
Light-water reactors pack low-enriched uranium oxide pellets in zirconium tubes, arranged in assemblies inside a vessel flooded with pressurised water that both moderates neutrons and carries heat. In a pressurised-water plant, steam generators transfer that heat to a secondary loop that looks like a fossil turbine island — turbines, condensers, feedwater chemistry — except every room is zoned for radiation and every valve has a training story.

Control rods and boron chemistry shim reactivity; operators move in small steps because delayed neutrons buy seconds of human reaction time. Containment buildings resist pressure from pipe breaks and limit hydrogen risks if mitigation fails. Spent fuel pools glow blue with Cherenkov light while decay heat drops toward dry-cask storage politics.

Advanced concepts swap coolants and fuels — helium, sodium, molten salt — each trading corrosion, activation, and leak reactivity differently. None removes the need for heat removal ethics after shutdown.

Operation is a licence to practice applied ethics: every alarm ties to a scenario analysis written in ink from prior plants. Preserving that culture across generations is as important as preserving forgings.

principles.name: Six-factor formula intuition
principles.explanation: Thermal utilisation, resonance escape, fast fission, reproduction factor, non-leakage probabilities multiply to k-effective — kept near 1.000 by operators.

principles.name: Doppler broadening
principles.explanation: Fuel temperature rise broadens resonances, increasing absorption — negative reactivity feedback that buys seconds in transients.

principles.name: Decay heat
principles.explanation: After shutdown, fission products still release ~6-7% power immediately — cooling must persist through blackouts or ponds boil.

principles.name: Dose ALARA
principles.explanation: As low as reasonably achievable — optimisation under uncertainty, not minimisation regardless of cost.

components.name: Reactor pressure vessel
components.function: Contains core and coolant at pressure
components.madeFrom: Forged low-alloy steel with stainless clad

components.name: Fuel assemblies
components.madeFrom: UO₂ pellets, Zircaloy tubes, spacer grids

components.name: Steam generator (PWR)
components.function: Transfers primary heat to secondary feedwater

components.name: Containment and suppression
components.madeFrom: Prestressed concrete, steel liner, ice condensers in some designs

rawMaterials.name: Uranium concentrate
rawMaterials.purpose: Fuel feed after conversion and enrichment
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Uranium from sandstone, unconformity, or porphyry deposits on Earth; off-world fission would more plausibly use shipped enriched oxide or thorium-uranium cycles engineered for that environment — not lunar helium-3, which implies an entirely different fuel cycle and reactor physics
rawMaterials.processingRequired: Conversion to UF₆, centrifuge enrichment, reduction to UO₂

rawMaterials.name: Heavy forgings
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Monolithic reactor-vessel forgings from a handful of world-capable forges; until local heavy forging returns, store retired vessel sections as templates, cooperate with regions that retain press capacity, or downscale to smaller modular reactors designed for bolted shells with conservative margins

rawMaterials.name: Boron carbide
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Boron carbide or silver-indium-cadmium in clad rods for thermal reactors; metallic hafnium assemblies where chemistry favours them — both require honest metallurgy and inspection, not improvised scrap

buildSteps.title: Treat licensing and independent review as part of the reactor, not paperwork around it
buildSteps.description: Write safety cases humans can read without a law degree: what fails, how you detect it, what power paths remain, how long until something worse happens if nobody acts. Invite external reviewers early — embarrassment in a conference room beats headlines later.
buildSteps.warningNote: Skipping peer review is not speeding up; it is gambling with cities

buildSteps.title: Forge, weld, and inspect nuclear-grade components with traceable identity
buildSteps.description: Every plate and weld gets certificates; radiography and ultrasonic testing find slag and lack of fusion before water ever touches metal. Qualify welders and procedures on coupons before production joints. Store bolts in tamper-evident bins — counterfeit fasteners have killed projects and people.
buildSteps.warningNote: A single wrong alloy in a steam generator tube sheet can write off years

buildSteps.title: Approach first criticality in measured boron steps, never by gut feel
buildSteps.description: Count fuel bundles twice; compare keff predictions to instrument trends at each dilution step. Rehearse who holds authority to stop if instruments disagree. Keep redundant independent channels for neutron detection.
buildSteps.warningNote: Mis-counted bundles have approached criticality wrong in history — do not add your story

buildSteps.title: Hot functional test every pump, valve, and snubber before loading fuel
buildSteps.description: Run primary loops at temperature without fission power; record vibration baselines; rehearse switching from normal to emergency cooling paths with clocks running. Water hammer cracks steam generator tubes — open and close valves per procedure, not bravado.
buildSteps.warningNote: A cracked tube can let primary chemistry meet secondary — a long expensive week

buildSteps.title: Ascend power slowly while chemistry and health physics watch xenon and iodine
buildSteps.description: Expect xenon transients after power changes; verify radiation monitors track predictions. Train shift crews on symptom-based drills, not only on knob labels. Relicense ageing equipment on evidence, not nostalgia.
buildSteps.warningNote: Organisational drift causes accidents — training rot is hardware failure

history.event: First self-sustaining chain reaction at Chicago Pile-1.
Obninsk APS-1 supplies grid power — first civilian nuclear electricity.
Shippingport reactor demonstrates PWR lineage in United States.

impact:
Nuclear plants supplied large fractions of carbon-free electricity in several nations — and concentrated waste, risk, and regulatory expertise.

Restart without enrichment and metallurgy knowledge is effectively impossible; preserving documents is not enough without institutions.

videos.title: Pressurised water reactor thermohydraulics
videos.description: Accredited nuclear engineering course segments on decay heat and containment.
